Client.title: Client
Client.description: Represents a client who can take active daily loans

phone.description: Cleaned telephone number of the client (only numbers)

Loan.title: Loan
Loan.description: Represents an active loan/contract defined by parameters and terms

clientId.description: The client ID related to this loan

totalDays.description: Total duration in days of this contract

startDate.description: Creation/Start date in ISO style YYYY-MM-DD

excludeSundays.description: Whether repayment schedule is shifted to exclude Sundays (default is true)

Payment.title: Payment
Payment.description: Represents a daily payment/repayment fraction made towards a loan contract

loanId.description: The target loan ID being repaid

referenceDate.description: Target cycle day reference date cleared (YYYY-MM-DD)

clients/{clientId}.description: Collection storing client profile records securely

payments/{paymentId}.description: Collection storing detailed loan repayment transaction receipts
